articles.title: Rupee tops Asia’s worst performers list with 9.9% slide in FY26
articles.description: The Indian rupee ended FY26 as Asia's weakest currency against the US dollar. It depreciated by 9.88% due to significant foreign investor withdrawals and strong global dollar demand. The Reserve Bank of India intervened to stabilize the rupee. The Japanese yen also saw a decline. The Malaysian ringgit emerged as the top performer.

articles.title: Judge temporarily halts Trump’s $400m White House ballroom project
articles.description: District Judge Richard Leon says construction has to stop until Congress provides statutory authorisation.

articles.title: FII exodus hits record Rs 1.6 lakh crore in FY26 despite strong DII cushion
articles.description: Foreign investors pulled out over ₹1.6 lakh crore from Indian stocks in FY26. This was the highest ever withdrawal. Domestic funds stepped in with a record ₹8.5 lakh crore. This inflow provided strong support against the foreign investor exits. Indian markets faced challenges from global events and currency depreciation.

articles.title: Commercial LPG Prices Hiked By Rs 195.5, No Changes In Domestic Rates
articles.description: Prices of commercial LPG were hiked by Rs 195.50 on Wednesday, on back of surge in global oil prices linked to the widening West Asia conflict.

articles.title: FAR from Ideal: FPI buying of G-Secs falls sharply in FY26
articles.description: Foreign investors bought fewer Indian securities in FY26. Outflows increased as West Asia conflict escalated. Economists predict muted flows in FY27 due to the Gulf conflict and a weaker rupee. Concerns over government finances also impacted sentiment. A major trigger like bond index inclusion is needed for significant inflows.

articles.title: LPG cylinder rate today after price hike: Check updated gas rates in Delhi, Bengaluru, Mumbai from 1 April
articles.description: LPG cylinder rate today after price hike: The price of a 19 kg commercial LPG gas cylinder has increased by in Delhi and Kolkata, starting today, 1 April.

articles.title: Toyota’s Woven Capital appoints new CIO and COO in push for finding the ‘future of mobility’
articles.description: Woven Capital is the growth-stage venture capital arm of Toyota, focused on backing founders building in space, cybersecurity, and autonomous driving.

articles.title: Rupee tops Asia’s worst performers list with 9.9% slide in FY26
articles.description: The Indian rupee ended FY26 as Asia's weakest currency against the US dollar. It depreciated by 9.88% due to significant foreign investor withdrawals and strong global dollar demand. The Reserve Bank of India intervened to stabilize the rupee. The Japanese yen also saw a decline. The Malaysian ringgit emerged as the top performer.

articles.title: FII exodus hits record Rs 1.6 lakh crore in FY26 despite strong DII cushion
articles.description: Foreign investors pulled out over ₹1.6 lakh crore from Indian stocks in FY26. This was the highest ever withdrawal. Domestic funds stepped in with a record ₹8.5 lakh crore. This inflow provided strong support against the foreign investor exits. Indian markets faced challenges from global events and currency depreciation.

articles.title: Commercial LPG Prices Hiked By Rs 195.5, No Changes In Domestic Rates
articles.description: Prices of commercial LPG were hiked by Rs 195.50 on Wednesday, on back of surge in global oil prices linked to the widening West Asia conflict.

articles.title: FAR from Ideal: FPI buying of G-Secs falls sharply in FY26
articles.description: Foreign investors bought fewer Indian securities in FY26. Outflows increased as West Asia conflict escalated. Economists predict muted flows in FY27 due to the Gulf conflict and a weaker rupee. Concerns over government finances also impacted sentiment. A major trigger like bond index inclusion is needed for significant inflows.

dailyNews.title: What’s behind Donald Trump’s interest in Iran’s Kharg Island?
dailyNews.description: The US president is threatening to take over Iran's oil export hub or destroy it.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order overhauling mail-in voting in major election integrity push
dailyNews.description: Trump signed an executive order targeting mail-in voting and voter eligibility, directing agencies to compile citizenship lists and add USPS tracking.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he will attend Supreme Court oral arguments on birthright citizenship challenge
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says he may attend Supreme Court arguments on his birthright citizenship order, which he claims was never meant to cover children of illegal immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Don Lemon talks possibility of being president, says he'd be 'a lot better than Donald Trump'
dailyNews.description: Ex-CNN anchor Don Lemon told "Pod Save America" that he doesn't have presidential aspirations at the moment but that he could run the country "a lot better."

dailyNews.title: 'The View' hosts ask Rahm Emanuel if Trump started Iran war to distract from Epstein
dailyNews.description: Iran war news dominates "The View" as Rahm Emanuel argues Trump made a "bad choice," warning the U.S. lacks a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz if Iran does not comply.

dailyNews.title: Judge Approves Trump Effort to Obtain List of Jews From University of Pennsylvania
dailyNews.description: The government’s effort to collect the names and phone numbers of Jewish people on campus as it investigates antisemitism has upset some people who worry about how the information will be used.

dailyNews.title: Judge Blocks Trump’s Order to End Funding for NPR and PBS
dailyNews.description: The ruling will have minimal effect on the federal money going to public media because Congress voted to claw back funding. But it could have implications for any future funding.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Struggles to Respond to Trump’s Suit Against IRS
dailyNews.description: Officials at the department and the White House are in the middle of a messy and complicated debate over how to respond to President Trump’s lawsuit demanding $10 billion from the I.R.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump Seeks to Redefine ‘Regime Change’ in Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump and his aides have made contradictory statements on whether the United States and Israel have transformed the Iranian government through violence.

dailyNews.title: Will $4 Gas Hurt Trump’s Approval Ratings? Here’s What History Shows.
dailyNews.description: Presidents since at least the Carter administration have seen their approval ratings tied to gas prices. But there are signs the correlation may be weakening.
